name: Tidio
description: Manage Tidio (live chat + AI chatbot) contacts, conversations, messages, tags via GraphQL from any AI agent. 7 tools, X-Tidio-Openapi-Token auth.
instructions:
This connector wraps the Tidio Public API (api.tidio.co/v1/graphql).

**Setup**:
1. Log into https://www.tidio.com → **Settings → Public API** (Tidio+ plan only).
2. Generate an API token. Set `TIDIO_API_TOKEN`.

**Authentication**: custom header `X-Tidio-Openapi-Token: ${TIDIO_API_TOKEN}` on every request.

**GraphQL-only**: Tidio's Public API is GraphQL — the adapter exposes a few common queries/mutations as wrappers; for ad-hoc queries use the auto-injected `tidio_graphql_query` / `tidio_graphql_mutation` / `tidio_graphql_schema` builtins.

**Visitor vs Contact**: Tidio tracks anonymous visitors (no email) and contacts (have email/identifier). Bind a visitor to a contact via `identify`.

**Pagination**: cursor-based via Relay edges: `edges[].node`, `pageInfo {endCursor, hasNextPage}`.

**Rate limits**: 10 req/sec per token + complexity budget. 429 with `Retry-After`.

**Out of scope here**: chatbot flow editor, broadcast scheduling, A/B testing — these are UI-only.

tools.name: tidio_get_project
tools.description: Get info about the connected Tidio project (id, name, plan).

endpointMapping.path: query ListContacts($first: Int, $after: String) { contacts(first: $first, after: $after) { edges { node { id name email phone tags { name } } } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } }

tools.name: tidio_get_contact_by_email
tools.description: Look up a contact by email.

endpointMapping.path: query GetContact($email: String!) { contact(email: $email) { id name email phone tags { name } customAttributes { key value } } }

tools.name: tidio_update_contact
tools.description: Update / upsert a contact by email.

endpointMapping.path: mutation UpdateContact($input: UpdateContactInput!) { contactUpdate(input: $input) { contact { id email } } }

query ListConvs($first: Int, $after: String, $status: ConversationStatus) { conversations(first: $first, after: $after, status: $status) { edges { node { id status contact { id email } assignee { id name } lastMessageAt } } pageInfo { endCursor hasNextPage } } }

tools.name: tidio_get_conversation
tools.description: Get a single conversation with messages.

endpointMapping.path: query GetConv($id: ID!) { conversation(id: $id) { id status contact { id email } messages(first: 50) { edges { node { id content author { id name role } createdAt } } } } }

tools.name: tidio_send_message
tools.description: Send a message to a conversation as an operator.

endpointMapping.path: mutation Send($input: SendMessageInput!) { messageSend(input: $input) { message { id } } }
